title: Verification Matrix Regression Harness And Exit Scoring
rationale: Phase 2 should not ship on feature completion alone. This bead assembles the Lore, Isolation, and Audit evidence into a regression harness and explicit exit score for supervised tutoring readiness.
focus_hint: Turn the prior six beads into a coherent matrix: session law, playback integrity, lesson-bound acts, guardian continuity, disclosure shaping, and escalation traceability. Include an exit score rather than a binary pass/fail only.
acceptance_criteria: Regression harness covers one-child scope preservation, lesson-bound tutoring, disclosure boundaries, escalation traceability, and guardian oversight continuity
Verification output maps findings to Lore, Isolation, and Audit evidence
Exit scoring blocks completion when any non-negotiable supervised tutor invariant regresses
Final verification references existing Phase 1 audit surfaces instead of inventing separate governance
